name: QA 1102
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1102

pmdaopenmetrics testing

specifically testing generic usecase



Note: if anything gets added or changed in qa/openmetrics/samples directory,

then this test (and all tests in group pmda.openmetrics) will need to be remade.

**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner direct --platform ubuntu1804 reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1102.out.bad)
4,8c4
< Culling the Performance Metrics Name Space ...
< openmetrics ... done
< Updating the PMCD control file, and notifying PMCD ...
< [...removing files...]
< Check openmetrics metrics have gone away ... OK
---
> Remove: cannot find domain.h (or similar) to determine the Performance Metrics Domain
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h fv-az60 -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h fv-az60 -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h fv-az60 -f simple.numfetch
